x_snc_airop_check_definition.ai_justification: HR catalog items enable Now Assist HRSD to guide employees through structured HR request intake. Low catalog coverage means AI-assisted HR request fulfillment cannot be offered for most HR service types.
x_snc_airop_check_definition.remediation_guidance: Create HR catalog items for your top HR service types (benefits enrollment, leave requests, payroll questions). Target: 20+ active HR catalog items. Now Assist HRSD enhances catalog items with AI-assisted intake and guided fulfillment.
